details.IncidentDetail: "[17] [Notification] [CHP]-10C PROVIDED 180 ; ENTERING IT ; 02 TOYT CAM 4D GLD RX381DP 2 PLTS FOR G CALIFORNIA TOW 22898 [Shared]"
"[13] A92-007 APPEARS FIRST TC CAME OUT AT 0450, STILL TRYING TO FIGURE OUT "
"[12] 97 AT TC WHERE SDI WAS 97, APPEARS TO BE 2 SEPARATE TC'S, TRYING TO FIGURE IT OUT NOW "
"[11] Incident 260505BC0075 was reopened. Comment: Incident Reopened : CORRECTION, UNK IF 1182, CALIFORNIA TOW ADVSD PICKED UP BRO TOYT CAM"
"[6] RP STATED SHE IS JNO 2 VEH TC "
"[2] ***INVOLVED RP IN A - LT BRO TOYT CAM - HYDROPLANNED AND LANDED ON IN CD AND FACING WW "
"[1] RP STATED SHE HAS VISUAL OF 2 VEH TC // TOW TK IS IN THE AREA"
"[1] ,,,CLR, GUSTY WINDS, T/A FOR ALL VEHS"
